description: Summary statistics for TFPA dataset extracted from heartbeat cycle logs

methodology.session_start: First timestamp in JSONL log (first tool result return)
methodology.first_productive_action: First Bash command hitting external API (Manifold, Moltbook, Gmail, Twitter) for T2; first git/gh API call for Clanky
methodology.excluded: Read, Write, Glob, Grep, TodoWrite, Edit, ToolSearch, Skill tool calls (setup/orientation)
methodology.capsule_files: Files read during orientation phase (before first productive action) that match known scaffold patterns (SOUL.md, self_rules.md, checkpoint.json, briefing, etc.)

notes: TFPA is measured in wall-clock seconds, not tokens. Token-based TFPA requires separate computation.
T2 cycles run on ~20-minute heartbeat intervals; Clanky cycles run on demand.
119 T2 logs span 2026-03-24 to 2026-03-26; 10 Clanky logs span a single day (2026-03-26).
Some Clanky logs had no productive action detected (17 of 27 — short or failed sessions).
Capsule files represent identity and context scaffold loaded during orientation phase.

scaffold_identity_kb = stable files explicitly read during orientation (SOUL.md, self_rules.md). CLAUDE.md is NOT included — it is injected as the system prompt, not read as a separate file. scaffold_context_kb = volatile files (checkpoint, health, state, briefing). Sizes based on current file sizes — identity files are stable, context files approximate.
